subcodes.first_line: O Ahmad! The Wronged One remembereth thee, and remembereth thee through the verses of God, the Lord of all worlds, that He may draw thee nigh unto Him. Verily, He is the All-Bountiful, the Most Generous [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا احمد یذکرک المظلوم و یذکرک بآیات الله رب العالمین لیقربک الیه انه هو الفضال الکریم
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for nearness to God, @suffering and imprisonment
